anomalies.title: Energy consumption above benchmark
anomalies.description: November energy usage is 15% higher than the industry benchmark for 4-star hotels (336.4 kWh/room vs 291.7 kWh/room expected).

anomalies.title: Excellent water efficiency
anomalies.description: Water consumption is 42% below industry benchmark (5.82 m³/room vs 10.0 m³/room benchmark). Great job!

recommendations.title: Install LED lighting in common areas
recommendations.rationale: Current energy usage suggests 30% of consumption is lighting. LED retrofit can reduce this by 60%.
action_steps: Audit current lighting inventory in lobby, hallways, restaurant
Get quotes from 2-3 commercial LED suppliers
Monitor energy savings monthly for 3 months

recommendations.title: Schedule HVAC system maintenance
recommendations.rationale: Energy consumption spike may indicate inefficient heating/cooling. Regular maintenance improves efficiency by 15-20%.
action_steps: Book certified HVAC technician for full system check
Consider programmable thermostats for guest rooms

recommendations.title: Implement smart room occupancy sensors
recommendations.rationale: With 72% occupancy, 28% of rooms are empty. Sensors can cut energy use in unoccupied rooms by 40%.
action_steps: Pilot in 10 rooms with motion sensors + smart thermostats
If ROI positive, roll out to all rooms
Integrate with PMS for automatic control
